query:
-- Check UCXcel services and their costs
SELECT planName, monthlyCost, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue
FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%collaborate%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%webex%'
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost
ORDER BY count DESC;

FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%collaborate%' OR LOWER(planName) LIKE '%webex%'
GROUP BY planName, monthlyCost
ORDER BY count DESC;
